FactionColonies.SupplyChain.SettlementNe.label: power
FactionColonies.SupplyChain.SettlementNe.description: Settlements require power to maintain infrastructure and keep buildings running.

FactionColonies.SupplyChain.SettlementNe.label: medicine
FactionColonies.SupplyChain.SettlementNe.description: Workers need access to medicine to stay healthy and productive.

FactionColonies.SupplyChain.SettlementNe.label: building materials
FactionColonies.SupplyChain.SettlementNe.description: Settlements require a steady supply of building materials for maintenance and repairs.
